formula: ABI3 = (max(LEC1, 0.01) * max(LEC2, 0.01) * max(FUS3, 0.01) * max(ABI4, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(VAL1 * VAL2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

AP1 = (max(FT, 0.01) * max(FD, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01) * max(LFY, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01) * max(FUL, 0.01))^(1/6) * min(1/max(AP2 * TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
AP2 = 1.0 * min(1/max(miR172 * SOC1 * BZR1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
ARF19 = 1.0 * min(1/max(IAA14 * IAA28 * HY5, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
ARF6 = (max(PIF4, 0.01) * max(BZR1, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(AUX_IAA * DELLA, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Auxin = (max(TAA1, 0.01) * max(YUC8, 0.01) * max(TAR2, 0.01) * max(YUC4, 0.01) * max(AUX1, 0.01) * max(YUC_TAA, 0.01) * max(YUC10, 0.01) * max(YUC11, 0.01) * max(TAR1, 0.01) * max(PGP10, 0.01))^(1/10) * min(1/max(GH3 * DAO1 * Decapitation, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
BIN2 = 1.0 * min(1/max(COP1_SPA * BRI1 * BAK1 * SPA1 * BSU1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

BRC1 = (max(Low_R_FR, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(SMXL678 * Cytokinin * BES1 * FT * Sucrose * TIE1 * Decapitation * PHYB, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
BZR_BES = (max(PP2A, 0.01) * max(BZR1, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(DELLA * BIN2 * MAX2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Brassinosteroid = (max(DET2, 0.01) * max(DWF4, 0.01) * max(CPD, 0.01) * max(BR_SYN, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(BAS1 * SOB7, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
CO = (max(Long_Day, 0.01) * max(GI, 0.01) * max(FKF1, 0.01) * max(PHYA, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(CDF1 * DELLA * PHYB * ZTL, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
COP1_SPA = (max(SPA1, 0.01)) * min(1/max(PHYB * PHYA * CRY1 * CRY2 * UVR8, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Cytokinin = (max(IPT5, 0.01) * max(IPT, 0.01) * max(Sucrose, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(CKX2 * CKX3 * CKX5 * AHP6 * CKX9, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
DELLA = (max(ABA, 0.01) * max(SPY, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(GID1 * SLY1 * Gibberellin, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Endosperm_Proliferation = (max(SHB1, 0.01) * max(MINI3, 0.01) * max(IKU2, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01) * max(BZR1, 0.01))^(1/5) * min(1/max(AP2 * Cytokinin * PRC2 * RBR1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FLC = (max(FRI, 0.01) * max(SVP, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(VIN3 * PRC2 * FCA * FPA * FLD * FVE * LD * AUT_SYN * lncCOOLAIR * LDL1 * EIN3, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

FT = (max(CO, 0.01) * max(PIF4, 0.01) * max(FKF1, 0.01) * max(GI, 0.01) * max(Warm_Temperature, 0.01) * max(T6P, 0.01) * max(TPS1, 0.01) * max(Photoperiod, 0.01))^(1/8) * min(1/max(FLC * SVP * CDF1 * AP2_TOE * FLM, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FUL = (max(FT, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Flowering_Time = (max(AP1, 0.01) * max(LFY, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01) * max(FT, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Gibberellin = (max(GA20OX1, 0.01) * max(GA3OX, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(GA2OX, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
HFR1 = (max(FHY1, 0.01) * max(PIF5, 0.01) * max(Light, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(COP1_SPA, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
HY5 = (max(BBX21, 0.01) * max(UVR8, 0.01) * max(BBX11, 0.01) * max(PHYB, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(Temperature * COP1_SPA * SPA1 * BBX25, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Hypocotyl_Length = (max(PIF3, 0.01) * max(PIF4, 0.01) * max(PIF5, 0.01) * max(BZR1, 0.01) * max(ARF6, 0.01))^(1/5) * min(1/max(HY5 * DELLA * EIN3 * HYH, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
IKU2 = (max(BZR1, 0.01) * max(IKU1, 0.01) * max(SHB1, 0.01) * max(MINI3, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(RAV1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Integument_Growth = (max(UBP15, 0.01) * max(KLUH, 0.01) * max(TTG2, 0.01) * max(GIF1, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01) * max(Cell_Proliferation_Duration, 0.01) * max(ANT, 0.01) * max(SEEDSTICK, 0.01))^(1/8) * min(1/max(DA1 * DA2 * EOD1 * SOD7 * DPA4 * AP2 * ARF2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
LBD = (max(ARF7, 0.01) * max(ARF19, 0.01) * max(WOX11, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01))^(1/4) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
LEC1 = 1.0 * min(1/max(VAL1 * VAL2 * PKL, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
LEC2 = (max(FUS3, 0.01)) * min(1/max(VAL1 * VAL2 * PKL, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
LFY = (max(FT, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01) * max(AGL24, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(DELLA * TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Lateral_Root_Density = (max(LBD, 0.01) * max(PLT, 0.01) * max(LAX3, 0.01) * max(PIN, 0.01) * max(ANR1, 0.01) * max(GATA23, 0.01) * max(BZR, 0.01) * max(Auxin, 0.01))^(1/8) * min(1/max(ARR_B * CLV1 * EIN2 * ABI4_5 * DELLA * D14 * MAX2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
MINI3 = (max(SHB1, 0.01) * max(IKU1, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(RAV1 * AIF2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Ovule_size = (max(ANT, 0.01) * max(Cytokinin, 0.01) * max(Cell_Proliferation, 0.01) * max(SEUSS, 0.01))^(1/4) * 1.0 * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
PIF3 = (max(DET1, 0.01) * max(EIN3, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(PHYB * DELLA * BIN2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

PIF4 = (max(Warm_Temperature, 0.01) * max(DET1, 0.01) * max(BZR1, 0.01) * max(HSFA1D, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(DELLA * GI * PHYB * CRY1 * HFR1 * ELF3_EC * TOC1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
